title: Update version scheme for release inside the copr repository
body:
### Feature request description

When I go to https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/podman-next/package/podman/

I see podman is built from git releases

![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/436777/4c116134-201c-49b9-99bf-0b68f1bc6df9)


for example it contains `102:4.5.0.rc1-1.20230728180220861848.main.1230.gb6a52f1f8`

then if I want to know the hash, I need to remove the `g` character from the suffix

### Suggest potential solution

Omit the `g` prefix before the git hash so it's easier to compare/grab commit so I can easily copy/paste the string and use 
`https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/<sha>` like https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/b6a52f1f8

### Have you considered any alternatives?

add separator like `g-` or `git-`

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
